docs:
# Floating Orbs
Soft blurred gradient orbs that drift behind hero headlines and CTAs.
## Import
```tsx
import { FloatingOrbs } from "@/components/ui/floating-orbs";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<FloatingOrbs count={4} color="#a855f7" speed={1} blur={80} color="#a855f7" />
```
## Props
- **count** (number) — default: `4`: Orb count
- **color** (string) — default: `"#a855f7"`: Color
- **speed** (number) — default: `1`: Speed
- **blur** (number) — default: `80`: Blur
- **color** (string) — default: `"#a855f7"`: Color
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add floating-orbs
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/floating-orbs
```
